README.html.summary: Demo code for CA1 See documentation html here (or pdf here) Unity app can be found here, to run: download the folder and run this file Known bugs: After first game inital cards are not dealt face down correctly (Fixed) Hand values are wrong in display (Fixed)

api/Blackjack_Class_Library.Blackjack.ht.title: Class Blackjack | doc
api/Blackjack_Class_Library.Blackjack.ht.summary: Class Blackjack Namespace Blackjack_Class_Library Assembly Blackjack_Class_Library.dll Represents a game of Blackjack, managing the state, player and dealer hands, betting, and game logic. public class Blackjack Inheritance object Blackjack Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Constructors Blackjack() Initializes a new instance of the Blackjack class, setting up the card shoe, player and dealer hands, player credit, bet, and game state. public Blackjack() Properties currentState public BlackjackState currentState { get; } Property Value BlackjackState playerBet public double? playerBet { get; } Property Value double? playerCredit public double playerCredit { get; } Property Value double playerHand public List<Card> playerHand { get; } Property Value List<Card> playerValue public int playerValue { get; } Property Value int Methods CanDoubleDown() Determines whether the player is eligible to double down based on the current game state, hand size, and bet status. public bool CanDoubleDown() Returns bool true if the player can double down; otherwise, false. DealCards(List<Card>, int) Deals n cards to either the player or the dealer, specified with toPlayer public List<Card> DealCards(List<Card> toHand, int n = 1) Parameters toHand List<Card> The hand the cards are dealt to n int The number of cards to deal Returns List<Card> The hand with cards dealt to it DealerHandSize() Gets the number of cards in the dealer's hand. public int DealerHandSize() Returns int The count of cards currently held by the dealer. DealerHandValue() Calculates and returns the total value of the dealer's hand. public int DealerHandValue() Returns int The total integer value of the dealer's hand. DealerTurn() Executes the dealer's turn in the Blackjack game, updating the dealer's hand and game state according to standard rules. public void DealerTurn() EndGame() Ends the current blackjack game, determines the outcome based on player and dealer hands, and outputs the result. public BlackjackResult EndGame() Returns BlackjackResult A BlackjackResult value indicating the outcome of the game. HandToString(List<Card>) Returns a comma-separated string of card IDs from the given hand. public static string HandToString(List<Card> hand) Parameters hand List<Card> The list of Card objects representing the hand. Returns string A string containing the IDs of the cards in the hand, separated by commas. HandValue(List<Card>) Calculates the total value of a hand of cards, treating aces as 1 or 11 to maximize the hand's value without exceeding 21. public static int HandValue(List<Card> hand) Parameters hand List<Card> The list of cards whose value is to be calculated. Returns int The total value of the hand. HiddenDealerCards() Calculates the number of hidden cards in the dealer's hand. public int HiddenDealerCards() Returns int The number of dealer cards not visible to the player. LookAtDealerHand() Returns the dealer's hand, hiding the first card during the player's turn. public List<Card> LookAtDealerHand() Returns List<Card> A list of cards representing the dealer's hand, with the first card removed if it is the player's turn. PlaceBet(double) Places a bet for the player if sufficient credit is available and no game is in progress. public void PlaceBet(double bet) Parameters bet double The amount to bet. Exceptions Exception Thrown if the bet exceeds available credit, a game is in progress, or the bet amount is zero or negative. PlayerTurn(BlackjackAction) Processes the player's action during their turn in a game of Blackjack. public void PlayerTurn(BlackjackAction playerAction) Parameters playerAction BlackjackAction The action chosen by the player, such as Hit or Stand. ShoeCount() Returns the number of cards currently in the shoe. public int ShoeCount() Returns int The number of cards in the card shoe. ShowPlayerCredit() public void ShowPlayerCredit() StartBlackjack() Initializes and starts a new game of blackjack, dealing cards to the player and dealer and updating the game state. public void StartBlackjack()

api/Blackjack_Class_Library.BlackjackAct.summary: Enum BlackjackAction Namespace Blackjack_Class_Library Assembly Blackjack_Class_Library.dll public enum BlackjackAction Fields DoubleDown = 2 Hit = 0 Stand = 1

api/Blackjack_Class_Library.Card.html.title: Class Card | doc
api/Blackjack_Class_Library.Card.html.summary: Class Card Namespace Blackjack_Class_Library Assembly Blackjack_Class_Library.dll Represents a playing card with a suit, rank, value, and identifier, and provides methods for creating and shuffling a standard deck. public class Card Inheritance object Card Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Constructors Card(Suit, Rank) Initializes a new instance of the Card class with the specified suit and rank, setting its value and identifier. public Card(Suit _suit, Rank _rank) Parameters _suit Suit The suit of the card. _rank Rank The rank of the card. Properties id public string id { get; } Property Value string rank public Rank rank { get; } Property Value Rank suit public Suit suit { get; } Property Value Suit value public int value { get; } Property Value int Methods GetDeck() Creates and returns a standard 52-card deck with all suits and ranks. public static Card[] GetDeck() Returns Card[] An array containing all 52 unique cards in a standard deck. ShuffleDeck(Card[]) Randomizes the order of cards in the specified deck. public static Card[] ShuffleDeck(Card[] deck) Parameters deck Card[] The array of cards to shuffle. Returns Card[] The shuffled array of cards.

api/Blackjack_Class_Library.CardCounter..title: Class CardCounter | doc
api/Blackjack_Class_Library.CardCounter..summary: Class CardCounter Namespace Blackjack_Class_Library Assembly Blackjack_Class_Library.dll Provides card counting functionality for a Blackjack game, maintaining running and true counts based on cards dealt to the player and dealer. public class CardCounter Inheritance object CardCounter Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Constructors CardCounter(Blackjack) Initializes a new instance of the CardCounter class with the specified Blackjack game. public CardCounter(Blackjack _game) Parameters _game Blackjack The Blackjack game instance to associate with the card counter. Fields game Represents the current Blackjack game instance. public Blackjack game Field Value Blackjack Properties decksLeft public double decksLeft { get; } Property Value double Methods GetRunningCount() Calculates and returns the current running count based on the cards dealt to the player and dealer, resetting the count if the card shoe has been refilled. public int GetRunningCount() Returns int The current running count after processing new cards. GetTrueCount() Calculates and returns the true count by dividing the running count by the number of decks remaining in the shoe. public double GetTrueCount() Returns double The current true count as an integer.
